# iaas_autoscaling_policy (Resource)

Manages a scaling policy attached to an autoscaling group. A policy drives scale-up / scale-down on a metric (cpu or memory) when it crosses the configured thresholds. The policy is a child of its group: the group_id is part of the API path, so changing it forces a new resource. Import with the composite id "<group_id>/<policy_id>".

Routes are gated by subuser permissions: `autoscaling.manage` (create/update), `autoscaling.delete` (delete).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Scale the web fleet up when sustained CPU exceeds 80%, down below 30%.
resource "iaas_autoscaling_policy" "web_cpu" {
  group_id = iaas_autoscaling_group.web.id

  metric               = "cpu"
  scale_up_threshold   = 80
  scale_down_threshold = 30

  # Optional tuning (server defaults apply when omitted).
  scale_up_step       = 2
  scale_down_step     = 1
  scale_up_cooldown   = 300
  scale_down_cooldown = 600
  evaluation_interval = 30
  evaluation_window   = 120
}

# A second policy on the same group driven by memory pressure.
resource "iaas_autoscaling_policy" "web_mem" {
  group_id = iaas_autoscaling_group.web.id

  metric               = "memory"
  scale_up_threshold   = 85
  scale_down_threshold = 40
}

# Import an existing policy with the composite "<group_id>/<policy_id>" id:
#   terraform import iaas_autoscaling_policy.web_cpu <group_id>/<policy_id>
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) UUID of the parent autoscaling group. Part of the API path; changing it forces a new resource.
- `metric` (String) Metric driving the policy: `cpu` or `memory`. Updatable in place.
- `scale_down_threshold` (Number) Metric percentage (0-99) that triggers a scale-down event. Updatable in place.
- `scale_up_threshold` (Number) Metric percentage (1-100) that triggers a scale-up event. Updatable in place.

### Optional

- `evaluation_interval` (Number) Seconds between policy evaluations (min 10). Defaults to 30.
- `evaluation_window` (Number) Seconds of metric history considered per evaluation (min 30). Defaults to 120.
- `scale_down_cooldown` (Number) Seconds to wait after a scale-down before another is allowed (min 30). Defaults to 600.
- `scale_down_step` (Number) Number of instances removed per scale-down event. Defaults to 1.
- `scale_up_cooldown` (Number) Seconds to wait after a scale-up before another is allowed (min 30). Defaults to 300.
- `scale_up_step` (Number) Number of instances added per scale-up event. Defaults to 1.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the policy, assigned by the API.
